channel.title: Saer Zulkarnain
channel.description: Unofficial RSS feed for Saer Zulkarnain

item.title: ঈদের দিনের বিশেষ পরিবেশনা। বি.দ্র. এটি একটি নিরীহ কিছিমের বিনোদনমূলক উপস্থাপনা, ...
item.description: ঈদের দিনের বিশেষ পরিবেশনা। বি.দ্র. এটি একটি নিরীহ কিছিমের বিনোদনমূলক উপস্থাপনা, অনুগ্রহ করে গোস্বা করবেন না।

item.title: Video shows the moment an Iranian missile struck Dimona in southern Israel, home...
item.description: Video shows the moment an Iranian missile struck Dimona in southern Israel, home to the country’s nuclear facility. Nearly 50 people have been injured. Iran had warned it would target the area if the US and Israel pursued regime change in Tehran. Al Jazeera English reports.

item.title: An Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer, Supriya Sahu, recently shared a ...
item.description: An Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer, Supriya Sahu, recently shared a truly heartwarming 15-second video on her verified X account (formerly Twitter). The clip, originally captured by wildlife photographer Dhanu Paran, offers a rare glimpse of a beautiful elephant family sleeping “blissfully” deep within the Anamalai Tiger Reserve in Tamil Nadu. Supriya mentioned that the footage is actually two years old, and she chose not to disclose the exact location to help ensure the safety of these magnificent animals.
